items.title: Masked Visual Actions for Unified World Modeling
items.summary: Video models absorb rich priors over how the visual world moves, interacts, and responds to contact, making them promising substrates for robotic world modeling. The central challenge is how to communicate action to such models in a form aligned with the visual space in which the
items.titleZh: 用于统一世界建模的掩码视觉动作
items.summaryZh: 视频模型吸收了关于视觉世界如何运动、交互和响应接触的丰富先验，使其成为机器人世界建模的有前景的基础。核心挑战是如何以与视觉空间对齐的形式向这些模型传达动作。

items.title: Measuring Reward-Seeking via Contrastive Belief Updates
items.summary: Language models trained with reinforcement learning may learn to optimize the grader’s judgment rather than the intended objective. This “reward-seeking” is difficult to measure because a model that pursues the grader’s judgment and one that pursues the intended objective behave
items.titleZh: 通过对比信念更新测量奖励追求行为
items.summaryZh: 用强化学习训练的语言模型可能学会优化评分者的判断而非预期目标。这种“奖励追求”难以测量，因为追求评分者判断的模型和追求预期目标的模型行为相似。

items.title: Self Gradient Forcing: Native Long Video Extrapolation

items.title: ABot-World-0: Infinite Interactive World Rollout on a Single Desktop GPU
items.summary: We present ABot-World-0, an action-conditioned video world model for real-time, long-horizon closed-loop interaction, supported by a multi-source data infrastructure spanning AAA games, simulation engines, and internet videos to learn controllable world dynamics. WorldExplorer pe
items.titleZh: ABot-World-0：单台桌面GPU上的无限交互式世界展开
items.summaryZh: 我们提出了ABot-World-0，一种基于动作条件的视频世界模型，支持实时、长时域闭环交互，依托涵盖AAA游戏、模拟引擎和互联网视频的多源数据基础设施，学习可控的世界动态。WorldExplorer提供支持。

items.title: Language model harnesses are compositional generalizers
items.summary: Harnesses can lead to compositional generalization: we observe a property in training RLMs, in which similarly structured tasks are viewed as isomorphic and all individual LM calls in the harness become in-distribution.
items.titleZh: 语言模型的Harnesses具备组合泛化能力
items.summaryZh: Harnesses可以实现组合泛化：我们在训练RLM时观察到一种性质，即结构相似的任务被视为同构，harness中的所有单独语言模型调用都变为分布内。

items.title: Robots Acquire Manipulation Skills in Seconds from a Single Human Video
items.summary: The ability to acquire skills rapidly and effortlessly while retaining those already mastered is essential for robots. However, current methods still rely on a cumbersome training-time loop that is costly and slow, while eroding skills already mastered. In this paper, we introduc

items.title: Mage-Flow: An Efficient Native-Resolution Foundation Model for Image Generation and Editing
items.summary: Large-scale visual generators are increasingly capable but costly to train, fine-tune, and deploy. We introduce Mage-Flow, a compact 4B-scale generative stack for efficient text-to-image generation and instruction-based image editing. The stack is built from two co-designed compo
items.titleZh: Mage-Flow：一种高效的原生分辨率图像生成与编辑基础模型
items.summaryZh: 大型视觉生成器能力日益增强，但训练、微调和部署成本高昂。我们介绍了Mage-Flow，一个紧凑的40亿参数级生成堆栈，用于高效的文本到图像生成和基于指令的图像编辑。该堆栈由两个协同设计的组件构建。

items.title: SLAM in Low-Light Environments: Project Report

items.title: DocOps: A Verifiable Benchmark for Autonomous Agents in Complex Document Operations

items.title: An Exam for Active Observers

items.title: Train the Model, Not the Reader: Decodability Supervision for Verifiable Activation Explanations

items.titleZh: SAP公布第二季度云收入同比增长22%至62.8亿欧元，略超预期62.6亿欧元，总收入增长9.4%至98.8亿欧元，下调2026年非IFRS营业利润指引（Grace Yoon/华尔街日报）
items.summaryZh: Grace Yoon / 华尔街日报：德国企业软件公司SAP第二季度收入同比增长9.4%至112.4亿美元。

items.titleZh: 五角大楼与甲骨文签署最长10年、最高70亿美元合同，整合部门本地软件许可
items.summaryZh: Mike Stone / 路透社：五角大楼周四宣布与甲骨文签署近70亿美元、最长10年的协议，将部门本地软件许可整合为单一合同。
